# Role enumeration

The author/recipient role of a message or the intended audience of content (spec §14.7). The only permitted wire values are `user` and `assistant`.

```csharp
public enum Role
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| User | `0` | The human participant. |
| Assistant | `1` | The language-model participant. |
